critical_bugs.error_message: PE reads kernel_base=0xFFFFFFF007004000 (wrong default) from IOSurface +0xF870
critical_bugs.root_cause: uwrite64(surface_address + 0xF870n, 0xFFFFFFF007004000n) hardcoded unslid default instead of kernel_base_global
critical_bugs.fix: Changed to (typeof kernel_base_global !== 'undefined' && kernel_base_global != 0n) ? kernel_base_global : 0xFFFFFFF007004000n. Applied to both line 8098 and 8125.

critical_bugs.error_message: WebContent crashes when scanning KC pages beyond confirmed-readable data_page
critical_bugs.root_cause: uread64 on GPU-unreadable KC addresses causes WebContent process crash/hang. Scanning data_page ±4MB or ±32MB hits unreadable pages.
critical_bugs.fix: Reverted all proc scan code. Only scan confirmed-readable regions (data_page itself, 64KB max).

critical_bugs.error_message: Phase 1.6b cs_enforcement_disable patch test crashes page
critical_bugs.root_cause: Writing 0xFFFFFFFF to unverified kernel addresses corrupts kernel memory. 11 candidates found but blind patching is dangerous.
critical_bugs.fix: Reverted via git stash. NEVER write large values to unverified kernel addresses.

critical_bugs.root_cause: mpd_malloc expects BigInt parameter. Passing JS number 8 causes type error or memory corruption.
critical_bugs.fix: Always use mpd_malloc(8n) with BigInt literal
